title: LastSeen
description: A mod for checking the last time a player has joined your server
body:
A mod for checking the last time someone played on your server.

List of commands:
/lastseen - Lists all players last seen time
/lastseen <player> - Shows the player last seen time

Configuration:
You can change the timezone for displaying the date and time of the players. Defaults to "Europe/Madrid". You can change it by editing the file in "config/lastseen.json" and changing the "timeZone" value.
